oneLiner: A native macOS terminal emulator (SwiftUI + embedded Ghostty) with a workspace model and CLI built for driving Claude Code sessions.
now: Restructuring project docs into docs/pm via /project-kit (status + ADRs + dashboard); removed legacy docs/feature|spec|superpowers.
next: Merge feat/skill-rename-implement: skill renamed /tian-cli → /tian + bundled /tian implement delegation script.
Cut a release (scripts/publish.sh) so the renamed skill ships and auto-installs to ~/.claude/skills.

milestones.title: Agent delegation (/tian implement) shipped in a release

shipped.summary: Bootstrapped the docs/pm context system with /project-kit (status + ADRs + dashboard + CLAUDE.md rules); removed legacy docs/feature|spec|superpowers.
Released v0.13.0: `tian worktree create --base <ref>` and auto-install of bundled skills to ~/.claude/skills on app update.
